mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_exposure WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'danger' THEN 0 WHEN 'warn' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_exposure WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_exposure WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_exposure (factor_name, factor_class, dept, process_name, measured_value, twa_standard, exposure_ratio, measure_date, worker_count, status, action, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{factorName}, #{factorClass}, #{dept}, #{processName}, #{measuredValue}, #{twaStandard}, #{exposureRatio}, #{measureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workerCount}, #{status}, #{action}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_exposure SET factor_name = #{factorName}, factor_class = #{factorClass}, dept = #{dept}, process_name = #{processName}, measured_value = #{measuredValue}, twa_standard = #{twaStandard}, exposure_ratio = #{exposureRatio}, measure_date = #{measureDate,jdbcType=DATE}, worker_count = #{workerCount}, status = #{status}, action = #{action}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_exposure SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
